description.en: Create or top up a spending allowance for an AI agent. Deposit EGLD or tokens and set per-transaction and periodic spending limits.
description.es: Create or top up a spending allowance for an AI agent. Deposit EGLD or tokens and set per-transaction and periodic spending limits.
description.fr: Create or top up a spending allowance for an AI agent. Deposit EGLD or tokens and set per-transaction and periodic spending limits.
description.ro: Create or top up a spending allowance for an AI agent. Deposit EGLD or tokens and set per-transaction and periodic spending limits.
description.it: Create or top up a spending allowance for an AI agent. Deposit EGLD or tokens and set per-transaction and periodic spending limits.

description.en: The wallet address of the agent to fund
description.es: The wallet address of the agent to fund
description.fr: The wallet address of the agent to fund
description.ro: The wallet address of the agent to fund
description.it: The wallet address of the agent to fund

description.en: Maximum amount the agent can spend per transaction in the token's smallest unit. Set 0 for unlimited.
description.es: Maximum amount the agent can spend per transaction in the token's smallest unit. Set 0 for unlimited.
description.fr: Maximum amount the agent can spend per transaction in the token's smallest unit. Set 0 for unlimited.
description.ro: Maximum amount the agent can spend per transaction in the token's smallest unit. Set 0 for unlimited.
description.it: Maximum amount the agent can spend per transaction in the token's smallest unit. Set 0 for unlimited.

description.en: Maximum amount the agent can spend per time period in the token's smallest unit. Set 0 for unlimited.
description.es: Maximum amount the agent can spend per time period in the token's smallest unit. Set 0 for unlimited.
description.fr: Maximum amount the agent can spend per time period in the token's smallest unit. Set 0 for unlimited.
description.ro: Maximum amount the agent can spend per time period in the token's smallest unit. Set 0 for unlimited.
description.it: Maximum amount the agent can spend per time period in the token's smallest unit. Set 0 for unlimited.

description.en: Unix timestamp when the allowance expires. Set 0 for no expiration.
description.es: Unix timestamp when the allowance expires. Set 0 for no expiration.
description.fr: Unix timestamp when the allowance expires. Set 0 for no expiration.
description.ro: Unix timestamp when the allowance expires. Set 0 for no expiration.
description.it: Unix timestamp when the allowance expires. Set 0 for no expiration.

description.en: The token and amount to deposit into the allowance
description.es: The token and amount to deposit into the allowance
description.fr: The token and amount to deposit into the allowance
description.ro: The token and amount to deposit into the allowance
description.it: The token and amount to deposit into the allowance

success.en: Allowance funded successfully. The agent can now spend within the configured limits.
success.es: Allowance funded successfully. The agent can now spend within the configured limits.
success.fr: Allowance funded successfully. The agent can now spend within the configured limits.
success.ro: Allowance funded successfully. The agent can now spend within the configured limits.
success.it: Allowance funded successfully. The agent can now spend within the configured limits.
